course_title: PROCESSES FOR THE PRODUCTION OF RENEWABLE FUELS AND CHEMICALS FROM BIOMASS
description: Various options for conversion of biomass into fuels and chemicals.  Evaluation of different biofuel technologies from a chemical engineering perspective, and a holistic overview of the current technical, legal, business, and financial challenges, and opportunities for the production of fuels and chemicals from biomass.  Several case studies on biomass conversion provide an overview of how technology is developed.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: CBE 250and310, graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
